PMS imprint colors are not guaranteed to be a perfect match on colored barrels, bodies, caps or clips. Call customer service for imprint color recommendations on specific product.

All SSI

Copy Change ▼

Minimum per copy change must be the minimum catalog quantity listed. Add $40.00(g) per copy change for round (screen printed) items. $50.00(g) per copy change for flat (pad printed) items.

CC

Proof ▼

Paper

• Add 2-3 days to production time. • Paper proofs are not available on 2 day or 24 hr service. • Liqui-Mark may choose to send a proof for approval when not requested at no additional charge. • All changes and approvals of paper proofs must be returned to us in writing via email or fax. • Changes on paper proofs may delay your order up to 3 days and may incur an additional proof charge.

$10.00 per order

Prod

Product

• Add 5-7 days to production time. • Product proofs are not available on 4 day, 2 day or 24 hr. service.

$25.00 per order

Rush Service ▼

Need it fast??? Contact factory to ensure rush service availability, options and pricing.

RUSH 24

24 Hour Rush

24 Hour Rush Add $150.00(g) to your order. Please note, order and final artwork must be received by 11:00am Eastern to ensure that your order will ship the next day. All rush services are dependent upon credit approval and problem free camera ready art.

RUSH 2D

2 Day Rush

2 Day Rush Add $100.00(g) to your order. Please note, order and final artwork must be received by 11:00am Eastern to ensure that your order will ship within the next two business days. All rush services are dependent upon credit approval and problem free camera ready art.

RUSH 3D

3 Day Rush

3 Day Rush Add $80.00(g) to your order. Please note, order and final artwork must be received by 11:00am Eastern to ensure that your order will ship within the next three business days. All rush services are dependent upon credit approval and problem free camera ready art.

Product Color ▼

Yellow or White with Red, Green, Purple, Orange, Yellow & Blue Crayons

8680 Color

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Crayo Craze Six Color Crayon Wheel in White. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style 868000 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 6 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 120 units (per catalog line).
